## Checklist (for new prompts)

- [ ] YAML follows the schema in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] Preview image attached at `images/previews/<id>.webp`, ≤ 200 KB
- [ ] Image is a real gpt-image-2 output, no other watermark
- [ ] Source / inspiration credited (if applicable)
- [ ] Not a duplicate of an existing prompt
- [ ] Ran `pnpm validate` locally with no errors
